title: Craftable Trident
description: Craft tridents with breeze rods and prismarine shards!
body:
**Adds a crafting recipe for the trident in a balanced way!**

**Craft tridents with breeze rods!**

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96c5689d4a8997d8a6f0eb3905210d5cd5ae77cb.png)
